name: @i-language/autocode
description_en: You say it, AutoCode ships it. 47 I-Lang skills covering understanding, planning, building, quality, debugging, deployment, progress, and learning. Code to deployment in one session.
description_zh: 您提出需求，AutoCode 实现。涵盖理解、规划、构建、质量、调试、部署、进度和学习等 47 个 I-Lang 技能。一次会话即可完成代码到部署
